this_title: Prinzessin Lillifee und das kleine Einhorn
trans_title: 莉莉菲公主与小独角兽2
introduction: In Pinkovia, Princess Lillifee and her friends are enjoying a beautiful summer. One night, however, the unicorn Rosalie appears to Lillifee in a dream and urgently asks for her help; she needs Lillifee to look after her baby Lucy. When Lillifee awakes, she discovers that Lucy has magically stepped out of her dream and is now sitting on her bed, fresh as a daisy. But what has happened to Rosalie?
chinese_title: 莉莉菲公主与小独角兽2
foreign_title: Prinzessin Lillifee und das kleine Einhorn
